title: Check NightOwl workflow execution and risky task handling

log.context: Check NightOwl workflow execution and risky task handling

Here's the full picture of what happened:

**Workflow status:** Running (status code 3), started at 06:59 UTC on 2026-03-26. Two tasks are still queued (both related to the commons rewrite).

**Root cause — missing activity:** The workflow woke up at exactly 10:00 UTC as scheduled, but immediately hit a hard failure:

```
NotFoundError: Activity function nightowl_flag_risky for workflow nightowl-today is not registered on this worker
```
